provenance.prompt: oil painting, semi-realistic painterly character concept art, muted dusty palette, subtle dark edges, soft upper-left directional lighting, worn and functional aesthetic, lived-in sci-fi, visible material texture and surface grain, visible brushstrokes, full body visible, front-facing standing pose, isolated on plain dark grey background, massive reptilian alien Veshan ship-lord with dark scales and an ancestral crest-cap, wearing heavy ceremonial plate armor with house heraldry, a blood-crimson cloak, no visible weapon because the ship is the weapon, the armor has been passed down and repaired across generations
provenance.negative_prompt: photorealistic, photograph, photo, stock photo, 3d render, smooth CG, CGI, octane render, unreal engine, anime, cartoon, chibi, bright saturated colors, clean pristine new clothing, glamorous, heroic pose, dynamic action pose, multiple characters, busy background, environmental background, landscape, text, watermark, blurry, low quality, extra limbs, deformed, medieval, fantasy, superhero

judgment.explanation: Cross-faction comparison subject. Faction-appropriate costume for the specified role, useful for teaching same-role-different-faction visual discrimination.
